name: iron-leaves
flavor_texts: Many of its physical characteristics match those of a Virizion from the future that was covered in a paranormal magazine.
According to the few eyewitness accounts that exist, it used its shining blades to julienne large trees and boulders.
text: Iron-leaves is the Paradox Pokémon. It is a grass and psychic-type Pokémon. Abilities: quark-drive. Base stats — HP: 90, Attack: 130, Defense: 88, Sp. Atk: 70, Sp. Def: 108, Speed: 104. Evolution line: iron-leaves. Lore: Many of its physical characteristics match those of a Virizion from the future that was covered in a paranormal magazine. According to the few eyewitness accounts that exist, it used its shining blades to julienne large trees and boulders.
